leadText: Petal Blizzard (Japanese: はなふぶき Cherry Blossom Blizzard) is a damage-dealing Grass-type move introduced in Generation VI. It is TM206 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Petal Blizzard does damage to all adjacent Pokémon, including allies. In Horde Encounters , it will target all opponents. Petal Blizzard will also destroy grass patches found in the background of battles . Petal Blizzard is a wind move .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA The user stirs up a violent petal blizzard and attacks everything around it. S V The user stirs up a violent petal blizzard and damages everything around it.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S MD It damages enemies in the same room. MD RT DX It damages enemies in the same room by stirring up a petal blizzard.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Petal Blizzard is the only physical wind move .
